app.name: Transformalize
app.one_liner: A configuration-based ETL tool that automates incremental denormalization of relational data for loading into search engines or analytics stores.

screens.name: Configuration Editor
screens.purpose: Create and manage ETL arrangements using XML or JSON to define data flows between relational and non-relational systems.

rust_commands.name: execute_etl
rust_commands.purpose: Run a validated ETL arrangement to denormalize and transfer data from source to target.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build basic CLI interface for executing arrangements
week 1: Implement core ETL execution engine supporting SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite
acceptance_tests: Given a normalized Northwind-like schema with 8 tables, when an arrangement is defined and executed, then a single denormalized document is produced in the target store.
When an invalid XML configuration is provided, the system rejects execution with clear validation errors.
